mapper.select: SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, m.email, '대우초등학교' AS school_name, NVL(COUNT(tc.class_id), 0) AS class_count, m.created_at AS join_date, m.account_status FROM teacher t JOIN member m ON t.teacher_id = m.member_id LEFT JOIN teacher_class tc ON t.teacher_id = tc.teacher_id WHERE m.account_status != 'DELETED' GROUP BY t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, m.email, m.created_at, m.account_status ORDER BY t.teacher_id

SELECT t.teacher_id, t.teacher_name, m.email, t.phone, t.intro, t.birth, m.created_at AS join_date, m.last_login_at, m.account_status FROM teacher t JOIN member m ON t.teacher_id = m.member_id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET account_status = #{accountStatus}, updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE member_id = #{teacherId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.class_id, c.class_name, c.class_status, COUNT(sc.student_id) AS student_count, tc.start_date, tc.end_date FROM teacher_class tc JOIN class c ON tc.class_id = c.class_id LEFT JOIN student_class sc ON c.class_id = sc.class_id WHERE tc.teacher_id = #{teacherId} GROUP BY c.class_id, c.class_name, c.class_status, tc.start_date, tc.end_date ORDER BY c.class_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member ( member_id, login_id, pwd, email, account_status, login_fail_count, last_login_at, locked_at, pwd_changed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{registDTO.loginId}, #{registDTO.initialPassword}, #{registDTO.email}, 'ACTIVE', 0, SYSDATE, NULL, SYSDATE, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO authority ( authority_id, member_id, role_code, role_name ) VALUES ( #{authorityId}, #{memberId}, 'TEACHER', '교사' )
INSERT INTO teacher ( teacher_id, teacher_name, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{registDTO.teacherName}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
